text: Why diesel engine generator does not have a reversing mechanism

options.text: Running reverse its phase sequence will change
Running reverse it produces DC instead of AC
Running reverse it consumes power instead of producing power
Running reverse does not produce power

explanation: Diesel generators are designed to rotate in one direction to maintain the phase sequence of the AC power. Running in reverse would reverse the current phase relationship and generally cause the generator to act as a motor, consuming electrical power.
